adGuid.description: The Object GUID of the Active Directory Group (Hexadecimal)

hasGroupOwners.description: If true, the group is owned by specific other users/groups. If false, if it is owned by Group Administrators.

isPlatform.description: Whether the group is a Platform Group

ownerGroupIds.description: List of owner GroupIds. Only used if HasGroupOwners is true.

ownerGroupNames.description: List of owner Group Names. Only used if HasGroupOwners is true.

ownerUserIds.description: List of owner UserIds. Only used if HasGroupOwners is true.

ownerUserNames.description: List of owner Usernames. Only used if HasGroupOwners is true.

synchronized.description: Whether the group is synchronized with Active Directory

synchronizeNow.description: Active Directory Sync will only pull in members for domain groups that have this set to true.
